items.prompt: evaluates bounded numerical expressions with signed rational numbers and absolute value accurately
items.expected_evidence: evaluate bounded rational-number expressions while preserving operation and grouping structure
items.scoring_guidance: Meets when the learner evaluates the expression accurately without collapsing its grouping or operation structure.

items.prompt: explains absolute value as distance from zero or magnitude and distinguishes it from sign and opposite value
items.expected_evidence: interpret absolute value on a number line as distance from zero
items.scoring_guidance: Meets when the learner explains absolute value through coherent distance or magnitude meaning.

items.prompt: Diagnose a peer error aligned to grouping_order_blindness.
items.expected_evidence: distinguish value, opposite, and absolute value in bounded cases
items.scoring_guidance: Meets when the learner identifies how the peer lost grouping, order, or symbol meaning.

items.prompt: succeeds across symbolic, number-line, verbal, and simple contextual numerical-expression and absolute-value representations
items.expected_evidence: explain why an expression result is reasonable using magnitude, grouping, and sign structure
items.scoring_guidance: Meets when the learner preserves expression and absolute-value meaning across varied representations and contexts.
